creator: rsos+freebsd@mailbox.org
text:
Hello!

Most of the vicious widgets are running under Linux only. A couple of weeks ago I did some work to port most of them to FreeBSD. As not touching any of the Linux specific widgets the end user is not negatively affected from the change but has a lot of new widgets they can use under FreeBSD.

The repository with some documentation is located here:
https://bitbucket.org/mutluyum/vicious_bsd/overview

Greetings
